tools.name: check_agent_trust
tools.description: Verify a counterparty before you pay it. Is this AI agent or x402 service real, trustworthy, and settlement-backed, or a scam, ghost, or rug? Use before settling an x402 payment, extending credit, or trusting another agent. Returns a 0-1000 AgentRank reputation and trust score from real on-chain USD

tools.name: gate_caller
tools.description: Decide whether to serve or refuse a calling agent based on its reputation (provider-side access control, requireRank). Use to turn away ghosts, freeloaders, scams, and low-trust callers before doing work for them. Pass the caller wallet or domain and a minimum AgentRank score; returns allow/deny, th

tools.name: classify_x402_address
tools.description: Is this Base/x402 address a real service, a buyer, a rail (payment passthrough), a treasury sink, or dust? tools.name: state_of_x402
tools.description: The State of x402: the de-noised census of the whole x402 agent-payment economy. Returns the real-vs-dust ratio, the role and flow breakdown (services, buyers, rails, treasuries), the count of real services (>$1000 settled), whale buyers, and a provenance anchor.
